title: Founding Engineer
description: Building an early-stage product platform from zero across architecture, UX systems, and full-stack infrastructure, with emphasis on composable workflows and long-term product flexibility.

signals.label: Focus
signals.value: Product infrastructure, UX systems, and composable workflows

signals.label: Scope
signals.value: Founding-level ownership across architecture and product direction

signals.label: Impact
signals.value: A flexible platform foundation for rapid product iteration

highlights: Architected a 50+ package Turborepo monorepo spanning domain logic, UI primitives, platform tooling, and product surfaces
Designed a composable widget system so interfaces can be assembled, extended, and iterated without rebuilding the product shell
Owned product infrastructure across command palette, theming, navigation, workspace structure, and developer documentation
Made early architecture decisions around package boundaries, shared configuration, and extensibility to keep the platform adaptable
Balanced product direction, UX quality, and implementation tradeoffs in a founding-engineer role with broad ownership

title: Software Engineer II
description: Built internal tooling for merchandising workflows where reliability, user trust, and operational efficiency mattered more than surface-level feature shipping.

signals.label: Focus
signals.value: Internal tooling, workflow automation, and data reliability

signals.label: Scope
signals.value: Cross-functional product work with Merch, IT, and Product

signals.label: Impact
signals.value: 300+ hours per month returned to merchandising workflows

highlights: Reduced Merch team workload by 300+ hours per month through targeted workflow automation and code-level optimizations
Led a rebuild of a core internal React and TypeScript app to improve scalability, maintainability, and day-to-day usability
Partnered with Merch, IT, and Product stakeholders to diagnose data issues and improve confidence in internal systems
Translated direct user feedback into shipped workflow improvements for real operational users

title: Apprentice Software Engineer
description: Contributed to consumer-facing web product work while learning production engineering practices inside an established product and platform team.

signals.label: Focus
signals.value: Consumer-facing web features and social sharing flows

signals.label: Impact
signals.value: Production product contributions inside an established web platform

highlights: Built social sharing features from product idea through production delivery on the Pandora web platform
Collaborated with product, design, and platform engineers across React, TypeScript, and GraphQL surfaces
Learned production engineering habits in a consumer product environment while contributing to active product initiatives

title: Lead Instructor
description: Led technical instruction and mentorship across full-stack engineering fundamentals, turning ambiguous student problems into teachable architecture and debugging lessons.

signals.label: Focus
signals.value: Technical mentorship, debugging, and full-stack fundamentals

signals.label: Scope
signals.value: 40+ students across project architecture and deployment

signals.label: Impact
signals.value: Clearer engineering judgment through repeated teaching and review

highlights: Mentored 40+ students through five projects each, guiding architecture, debugging strategy, and deployment decisions
Delivered live full-stack lectures across JavaScript, React, Redux, Ruby on Rails, ActiveRecord, and developer workflows
Improved curriculum delivery with real-world coding challenges, modern tooling, and clearer technical communication
